assets.purpose: Privacy-protected relay indicator in the simulated seller call approval and call header.
assets.prompt: Original shield-and-routing icon in a warm neutral and trust-green palette; no text, logo, person, or marketplace branding.

assets.purpose: Evidence verification state for condition, mandate, and protected-payment checks.
assets.prompt: Original magnifying-glass and check icon in a restrained consumer-fintech style; no text or brand marks.

assets.purpose: Compact risk signal for a direct-transfer or buyer-protection violation.
assets.prompt: Original high-contrast transaction warning icon using a muted risk red; no marketplace branding.

assets.purpose: Neutral illustration behind the explicitly simulated payment confirmation state.
assets.prompt: Original protected receipt with a confirmation check, warm white background, trust green accent, no payment-network logo, amount, code, or identifying information.

assets.purpose: Trust-oriented end state after the agent rejects an unsafe off-platform transaction.
assets.prompt: Original mandate shield blocking an unsafe transfer card; premium editorial composition, no bank, platform, or merchant branding.

assets.purpose: Precomputed waveform for the 27-second simulated German seller verification call.
assets.prompt: Deterministic seven-section waveform whose segment widths follow the 4s, 4s, 5s, 5s, 3s, 3s, and 3s dialogue timings; alternating agent and seller colors; no live audio analysis.

assets.purpose: Fictional, non-identifying avatar for the scripted private-seller conversation.
assets.prompt: Original geometric silhouette with no facial detail; fictional person, no resemblance target, logo, marketplace color lockup, or identifying feature.

assets.purpose: Fictional, non-identifying avatar for the simulated foreign seller call.
assets.prompt: Original abstract seller silhouette with no facial detail; not based on a real person; no flag, logo, marketplace branding, or identifying detail.
